data.name: Hentai Tales: Queen x Loser - Twisted Revenge
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在解開燒腦謎題的同時享受誘人劇情！
按順序連接數字，填滿棋盤上的所有方格
完成謎題後即可解鎖全新火辣畫面與後續劇情！
你能解開所有謎題並邂逅全部女孩嗎？！

故事背景

我曾是校園最底層的敗犬，而鬼龍院憐是眾人高不可攀的女王。她當眾羞辱我告白的行徑徹底擊潰了我。
如今在大學裡，詭異現象發生了：全世界都遺忘了她的存在。唯有我能看見她。這是我的機會。
我要收留這名絕望的、被遺忘的美人，將她塑造成我專屬的完美順從寵物。這就是我的復仇。

角色介紹

鬼龍院憐：

昔日辣妹女王，如今淪為無人可見的幽靈。失去地位的她陷入絕望孤寂，為求生存不得不臣服於昔日欺凌對象，逐漸覺醒出嶄新而屈辱的快感。

遊戲特色

  • 20張美少女性感撩人的香豔畫面
  • 與性格鮮明少女們展開的奇幻情色故事
  • 可跳過解謎直接體驗劇情（解謎時按下Enter鍵）
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎完成後點擊CG左右按鈕切換）

data.name: Hentai Tales: Queen x Loser - Twisted Revenge
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

I was the school's biggest loser, and Kiryuuin Ren was its untouchable queen. Her public humiliation of my confession broke me.
Now, in college, a bizarre phenomenon occurs: the world has forgotten she exists. I am the only one who can see her. This is my chance.
I will take in this desperate, forgotten beauty and mold her into my perfect, obedient pet. This is my revenge.

Characters

Kiryuuin Ren:

The former gyaru queen, now a invisible phantom to the world. Stripped of her status and desperately lonely, she must submit to her former victim to survive, awakening to new, degrading pleasures.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
